sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_struct_table (data STRUCT<first INT, second INT>);
SELECT struct_extract(data, 1) AS first_value FROM test_struct_table;
UPDATE test_struct_table SET data = row(70, 90) WHERE struct_extract(data, 1) = 42;
SELECT struct_extract(data, 2) AS second_value FROM test_struct_table WHERE struct_extract(data, 1) = 70;
